name: find-skills-sanity
description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities.
intent_triggers: use the find skills agent skill
run a workflow for find skills
我需要處理 find skills 相關工作
幫我啟用 find skills 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 find skills

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the find skills skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
